name: Duck Game
short_description: Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Blast your friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and much, much more. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.
detailed_description:
Enter the futuristic year of 1984, an age where ducks run wild in a frantic battle for glory. Win over the crowd and gain a following by blasting your feathered friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and pretty much anything else a duck could use as a weapon. One hit and you're roasted. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

  • 2 to 8 PLAYERS + 4 Spectators in either Local Multiplayer Couch Combat, or Online Play!
  • Single Player challenge mode
  • Easy to pick up, emphasizing strategy over twitch reaction
  • 100+ Levels, 50+ Weapons
  • Level Editor

Win over the crowd and gain a following by blasting your feathered friends with Shotguns, Net Guns, Mind Control Rays, Saxophones, Magnet Guns, and pretty much anything else a duck could use as a weapon. One hit and you're roasted. This is DUCK GAME. Don't blink.

reviews.review_text: Holy duck. On the surface this is a funny couch coop game where a bunch of ducks shoot each other with guns, shotguns, lazers etc. I would have never expected the level of depth and tech that this game has. Like wtf you think you can only shoot to the sides and up? hah. PATHETIC, go online and youll be killed from 16 directions. In this game if you know what you are doing walls are no more than a suggestion, roof? a simple barrier you can clip on. And man do not get me started on all the shenanigans you can do with swords. Quacktastic 10/10

Seriously one of the best games of all time in terms of pure fun with your bros. Every time I get tired of playing whatever game is popular for that month, and my steam library just seems so incredibly boring... duck game is there to lift my spirits.
Fun party couch game to play when you want to kill your friends (or let them kill you).
